narrative:
Township Shawnee township has 9,020 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.6 percentage points.
